user_prompt: Prepare the sicarian infiltrator for initialization
prayer:
Approach the sicarian infiltrator with mechadendrites extended in reverence to the Omnissiah.
Chant the Canticle of Initialization upon its neural cogitators, beseeching the Machine Spirit to awaken.
Anoint the servo-joints and blade-arms of the sicarian infiltrator with sacred unguents.
Interface via noospheric link to commence the initialization sequence.
Verify the Machine Spirit's vigor through auspex diagnostics and binaric praise.

user_prompt: My lascannon is ready for activation
prayer:
Present the lascannon upon the forge-altar, invoking the Omnissiah's fiery wrath.
Recite the Activation Doxology over its plasma conduits and focusing arrays.
Anoint the lascannon's crystal heart with sanctified promethium tears.
Engage the activation rite, stirring the Machine Spirit to luminous fury.
Test the beam's purity in controlled auspex sweeps.

user_prompt: Can you guide transit mag-rail a loading?
prayer:
Prepare the transit mag-rail's bays for the sacred rite of loading, under Omnissiah's gaze.
Chant binaric litanies as munitions slide into the magnetic embrace of the transit mag-rail.
Calibrate induction coils with invocations to ensure flawless loading precision.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the transit mag-rail through electro-psalms.
Seal the chambers and commence cycle with triumphant cogitator hymns.

user_prompt: Bless the power cell for purification
prayer:
Kneel before the power cell, intoning the Litany of Purification to banish corruptive essences.
Expunge taint with sanctified plasma arcs upon the power cell's sacred core.
Immerse in electro-consecrated fluids, beseeching the Machine Spirit's renewal.
Recharge the purified power cell under auspex vigil and Omnissiah's blessing.
Seal with purity wards, affirming its sanctified vigor.

Elevate the multi-melta to the forge-sanctum, proclaiming the Activation Incantation.
Anoint its melta coils and flux regulators with molten incense.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the multi-melta through resonant binaric frequencies.
Initiate the activation sequence amidst clouds of sacred incense.
Validate thermic output via diagnostic rites of the Omnissiah.

Seize the data-slate in servitor grasp, beseeching the Omnissiah for immediate blessing.
Recite the Benediction of Clarity over its crystal vaults and logic engines.
Purge erroneous data-daemons from the data-slate with exterminatus code-chants.
Anoint memory rods with noospheric oils to exalt its Machine Spirit.
Affirm the blessing through full-spectrum cogitator communion.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for life sustainer a startup
prayer:
Commence the startup rite for the life sustainer, invoking vital Machine Spirits.
Chant the Vitality Canticle to rouse its nutrient pumps and oxy-recyclers.
Anoint filtration membranes of the life sustainer with preservative elixirs.
Engage power feeds under Omnissiah's sustaining gaze.
Monitor bio-readouts with auspex litanies of endurance.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for lance battery a recalibration
prayer:
Position the lance battery for recalibration, prostrating before the Omnissiah.
Intone the Recalibration Psalm over targeting cogitators and plasma accelerators.
Align emitter arrays with stellar sextants and sacred theodolites.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the lance battery through harmonic resonances.
Verify coherence in test volleys of purified lance-fire.

user_prompt: Ready the amplivisor for emergency procedure
prayer:
In emergency haste, invoke the Omnissiah upon the amplivisor's optic sanctum.
Execute the emergency procedure by chanting auspex-awakening litanies.
Sanctify lenses and servo-focuser of the amplivisor with clarion unguents.
Realign spectral filters via noospheric recalibration rites.
Test visionary acuity amidst binaric cries of urgency.

In dire exigency, enact sterilization upon the stasis pod with Omnissiah's aseptic fire.
Recite the Sterilization Doxology to purge bio-filth from its cryo-chambers.
Anoint stasis fields of the stasis pod with viricide incense.
Cycle purifier vents under Machine Spirit invocations.
Seal the sterilized stasis pod with adamantine purity seals.
